title: Contact
excerpt: Get in touch with Idun Works.
meta_description: Tell us about your project. We build fast, honest websites with the Idun CMS.

settings.title: Let’s build something.
settings.subtitle: Tell us what you need. No sales pitch, just honest answers.

settings.content:
How to reach us

📧 hello@idunworks.com

Or find us on social media:

Instagram · Facebook · X / Twitter · LinkedIn

What we need from you

To give you a useful answer quickly, tell us:

  • What kind of site? — Business, community, shop, portfolio, course platform?
  • Existing site? — Are we rebuilding or starting fresh?
  • Timeline? — When do you need it?
  • Budget range? — Helps us scope honestly. We won’t upsell.

We typically respond within 24 hours. Often much sooner — Buttler doesn’t sleep.
